unit_checks.behavior: returns 400 when serviceType is missing from the request body
unit_checks.expected: HTTP 400 with JSON error body and no Cosmos/Event Grid calls

unit_checks.behavior: returns 400 when cidPin is required by settings but missing from the request body
unit_checks.expected: HTTP 400 with JSON error body and no request record write or event publish

unit_checks.behavior: returns 409 when jurisdiction/service combination is disabled by settings lookup
unit_checks.expected: HTTP 409 with JSON error body and no request record write or event publish

unit_checks.behavior: returns 200 on valid request input and persists request record
uses UPSTREAM as the default source when source is omitted
unit_checks.expected: request processing follows the UPSTREAM validation path

unit_checks.behavior: adds branch to downstream event detail for MERGE_EVIDENCE and ORDER_RESUBMIT event types
unit_checks.expected: published event detail contains branch field

unit_checks.behavior: returns 400 when the request body is missing, empty, or invalid JSON
unit_checks.expected: HTTP 400 with JSON error body and no Cosmos/Event Grid calls

unit_checks.behavior: returns 400 when required jurisdiction is missing for a jurisdiction-gated request
unit_checks.expected: HTTP 400 with JSON error body and no request record write or event publish

unit_checks.behavior: loads settings for the requested jurisdiction/service combination
unit_checks.expected: returns structured settings data used by validation logic

integration_checks.interaction: constructs CosmosClient with DefaultAzureCredential and uses the settings container for lookup
integration_checks.verify: mock CosmosClient, get_database_client, and get_container_client; assert expected item read/query call occurs

integration_checks.interaction: constructs CosmosClient with DefaultAzureCredential and upserts the request record into the request container
integration_checks.verify: mock upsert_item call with generated ddbId and request payload

integration_checks.interaction: publishes downstream event to dataGenerator with preserved source/destination/detail payload shape
integration_checks.verify: mock EventGridPublisherClient send call and assert event body fields are correct

integration_checks.interaction: uses DefaultAzureCredential for all Azure client authentication
integration_checks.verify: patch DefaultAzureCredential and assert it is instantiated lazily inside client factory functions

behavioral_contract: preserve CID/PIN gating behavior based on settings lookup
preserve disabled jurisdiction/service conflict behavior as HTTP 409
preserve downstream event detail shape for dataGenerator publication
preserve request record creation before downstream publish attempt
preserve ddbId generation in success and error paths

checks: Azure Functions HTTP trigger entrypoint exists
environment variable placeholders exist for Cosmos and Event Grid configuration
contains at least one test that invokes the Azure Function entrypoint
covers happy path and validation failures
declares Cosmos DB resources for request and settings containers
declares Event Grid resources or required publication target
uses managed identity and app settings for secrets/configuration

global_checks: no AWS SDK imports anywhere in the migrated module
no stubs, no NotImplementedError, no placeholder in-memory repositories
module is self-contained and does not import sibling packages
